title: Jujutsu Kaisen Custom GUI Pack
body: **![Jujutsu Kaisen GUI Pack](https://i.imgur.com/D2eqkVh.png)** **Introduction:** This is a GUI-only resource pack inspired by the anime "Jujutsu Kaisen". You can freely use it with other resource packs by placing it on top of the ones you currently use. The pack includes a custom hot bar and various GUI elements themed in a red and black palette. If you'd like to see other color options, such as yellow and white, feel free to leave a suggestion! **Join Our Discord:** Explore our Discord server where you can suggest and vote for the next pack, participate in anime discussions. [Join Here](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **Feature Highlights:** - **Hud:** ![Hud](https://i.imgur.com/k7Iu0qn.png) - **Settings:** ![Settings](https://i.imgur.com/Mfd5mbY.png) - **Creative Menu:** ![Creative Menu](https://i.imgur.com/66vh3lU.png) - **Crafting Table:** ![Crafting Table](https://i.imgur.com/orI23qs.png) - **Furnace:** ![Furnace](https://i.imgur.com/2ZBcpPk.png) - **Enchantment Table:** ![Enchantment Table](https://i.imgur.com/VeB2QWt.png) - **Blast Furnace:** ![Blast Furnace](https://i.imgur.com/ibfhWoM.png) - **Stonecutter:** ![Stonecutter](https://i.imgur.com/BSGBe3d.png) - **Brewing Stand:** ![Brewing Stand](https://i.imgur.com/M5ZciJi.png) - **Loom:** ![Loom](https://i.imgur.com/VmhOF8J.png) - **Cartography Table:** ![Cartography Table](https://i.imgur.com/3geKSUP.png) - **Grindstone:** ![Grindstone](https://i.imgur.com/hI4so1O.png) - **Shulker Box:** ![Shulker Box](https://i.imgur.com/SPBWT5M.png) - **Chest:** ![Chest](https://i.imgur.com/hrmXGbx.png) - **Beacon Menu:** ![Beacon Menu](https://i.imgur.com/i8U6INw.png) - **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Villager Trading Menu](https://i.imgur.com/80QCSlG.png) **Additional Resources:** - Explore more packs on [ListarMC](https://listar-mc.net/) - Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) for suggestions, voting on future packs, and anime discussions **Thank you for your support! ❤️**
